channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: TMC - Defects -FW6 Potholes problem, 24th April
item.description:
Stats Required FWPH 700 x 100 x 28mm 3-Way Stop & Go - Footway Closure - Alternative Footway Available 1 x Non-Safety Defect (FW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road markings centre of road, 24th April
item.description:
Please could you look to repair the white lines down the middle of length of lilliesfield avenue
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lilliesfield Avenue, Hucclecote, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Road marking white lines or studs

item.title: TMC - Defects -FW6 Potholes problem, 24th April
item.description:

Report on FixMyStreet
